name: A2AC Workflow Agent
description: Open infrastructure for agent-to-agent workflow automation. A2AC connects approved AI workflows across platforms — Salesforce, Azure, Google Cloud — with shared work records, semantic memory, and cube-based validation.

skills.name: Cube Validation
skills.description: Validates Q-Protocol .cube files. Parses agent definitions, extracts actions, constraints, and metadata. Returns structured validation results.
examples: Validate this cube file for syntax and structure
Check if this agent definition is well-formed

skills.name: Semantic Memory — Store
skills.description: Stores text as vector embeddings in the agent brain using Vertex AI text-embedding-004 and ChromaDB. Supports metadata tagging for retrieval.
examples: Remember this workflow result for future reference
Store this document summary with metadata

skills.name: Semantic Memory — Recall
skills.description: Performs semantic search across stored agent memories. Returns ranked matches with distance scores and metadata.
examples: Recall any previous work related to mortgage condition review
Find similar workflow patterns from past executions

skills.name: Commerce — Create Offer
skills.description: Creates a binding commercial offer for agent services. Supports pricing, currency, and expiration. Offers are tracked and can be accepted by other agents.
examples: Create an offer for document processing at $0.05 per page

skills.name: Workflow Ledger
skills.description: Records immutable work transactions on the Q-Chain. Tracks sender, recipient, amount, and payload. Supports mining for block finalization.
examples: Record this workflow completion on the ledger
Get the full audit chain for this session

skills.name: Memory Librarian
skills.description: Automatically scans, clusters, and assigns unorganized memories to specialized sub-swarms. Maintains semantic hygiene across the agent brain.
examples: Organize recent memories into topic clusters
Assign unprocessed entries to the right swarm

skills.name: Payment — Subscribe
skills.description: Creates Stripe checkout sessions for A2AC subscription plans. Supports Pro ($49/mo) and Enterprise ($499/mo) tiers with automatic billing.
examples: Subscribe to the A2AC Pro plan
